articles.title: FREE WITH NYLAS
articles.summary: Nylas [5] lets you sync data and automate tasks from users' inboxes, calendars, and address books — using the same embedded email + calendar APIs that power Compass, Crunchbase, and Wix.

articles.title: ELEVEN LABS CONVERSATIONAL AI
articles.summary: Eleven Labs has launched a new conversational AI service that is more of an end-to-end product for building conversational agents. It uses a variety of LLMs on the backend while integrating seamlessly to a wide variety of specialized voices.

articles.title: CLAUDE MODELS NOW FASTER AND SMARTER ON AWS TRAINIUM2
articles.summary: Claude models are being optimized for AWS' advanced Trainium2 AI chips. This will enable faster and more efficient performance. Claude 3.5 Haiku is now available on AWS Trainium2 and model distillation in Amazon Bedrock.

articles.title: AMAZON LAUNCHES NOVA
articles.summary: Amazon Nova introduces a suite of multimodal models designed for tasks like document analysis, visual understanding, and creative content generation. With a focus on customization and efficiency, Nova models cater to diverse enterprise needs while excelling in tasks that combine text, image, and video inputs.

articles.title: DIFFUSION MEETS FLOW MATCHING: TWO SIDES OF THE SAME COIN
articles.summary: This post talks through some of the literature and shows that, mathematically, both flow matching and diffusion models are the same. Interestingly, flow matching still seems to scale better practically.

articles.title: RESTRUCTURING VECTOR QUANTIZATION WITH THE ROTATION TRICK
articles.summary: Vector Quantization relies on gradient estimation through what's known as the Straight Through Gradient estimator. However, its direction is sometimes incorrect. This paper suggests rotation as a way to fix the gradients and improve code book utilization.

articles.title: LAYOUT GENERATION WITH DIFFUSION GANS
articles.summary: DogLayout is a hybrid model that combines GANs and diffusion processes to overcome challenges in layout generation.

articles.title: TAKE THE STATE OF AI DEVELOPMENT SURVEY FOR A CHANCE TO WIN A NEW MACBOOK M4
articles.summary: Ever wonder how other companies are developing, shipping, and monitoring AI? Vellum is running the ultimate AI-in-production survey [13], and they're looking for insider knowledge from folks like you. It takes 4 minutes and you'll get early access to the report once it

articles.title: drops PLUS a chance to win a MacBook M4. No brainer!
HUNYUAN VIDEO MODEL
articles.summary: This state-of-the-art open video model from Tencent is particularly compelling due to its realistic motion and dual training as an image generation model. This dual training means the aesthetics of the output are higher quality, akin to image generation models like Flux.

articles.title: SCENE TEXT RECOGNITION
articles.summary: TextSSR is a framework that uses diffusion-based methods to generate accurate and realistic synthetic text images for scene text recognition.

articles.title: VIDEO UNDERSTANDING WITH MULTIMODAL LANGUAGE MODELS
articles.summary: T2Vid is a new method to enhance video understanding in Multimodal Large Language Models (MLLMs). It generates video-like samples to diversify training instructions.

articles.title: A SYSTEM OF AGENTS BRINGS SERVICE-AS-SOFTWARE TO LIFE
articles.summary: AI is transitioning software from a tool to autonomous agents capable of executing tasks traditionally performed by humans, with a projected $4.6 trillion market opportunity. Innovations such as LLMs and agents enable AI systems to process unstructured data, make decisions, and act autonomously across sectors like sales and healthcare. The future of AI involves Systems of Agents that collaborate and learn from each other, functioning like a highly skilled team to deliver services.

articles.title: AI MUSIC IS MORE REALISTIC THAN EVER: MEET SUNO'S NEW MODEL
articles.summary: Suno has become the fifth most-used generative AI service with its realistic AI music model V4, despite facing a copyright lawsuit. The model improves user experience by focusing on human preferences, offering enhanced sound quality and advanced composition skills. Suno aims to advance AI-human music collaboration while addressing copyright concerns with the recording industry.

articles.title: BLUESKY'S OPEN API MEANS ANYONE CAN SCRAPE YOUR DATA FOR AI TRAINING
articles.summary: Bluesky isn't using user content to train AI, but third parties like Hugging Face have accessed posts for machine learning research. This highlights the public nature of user posts and the challenges in controlling third-party use. Bluesky is exploring ways for users to convey consent, but enforcement outside its platform remains a challenge.

articles.title: AISUITE
articles.summary: aisuite provides a unified interface for seamless interaction with multiple LLM providers, aiding developers in testing and comparing outputs without altering code.

articles.title: OVER ½ OF LONG POSTS ON LINKEDIN ARE LIKELY AI-GENERATED SINCE CHATGPT LAUNCHED
articles.summary: Since ChatGPT's launch, LinkedIn has seen an 189% surge in AI-generated content, with over half of long-form posts now likely AI-driven.

articles.title: GOOGLE LAUNCHES THE LONDON AI CAMPUS
articles.summary: The AI Campus is an educational pilot to support and diversify the next generation of local AI talent.
